creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Bug 196535 shows that games/epiar fails to compile when libc++ r224926 is
imported:

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/headamd64PR196535-default/2015-01-07_20h10m47s/logs/errors/epiar-0.5.1_5.log

The fix is simple: AlertMessage::operator==(const AlertMessage&) should be made
const.
